title: BEM-856 patch protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/protocols','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:32 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
changes_state=load('governance/state/bem855_extract_reapproval_changes.json')
changes=changes_state.get('changes',[])
base=Path('governance/protocols/BEM846_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md')
base_text=read(base)
patched=Path('governance/protocols/BEM856_PATCHED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md')
patched.write_text(base_text+sep+sep+'---'+sep+sep+'# BEM-856 | Reapproval Patch'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'## Claude requested changes / blockers applied'+sep+sep+('\n'.join('- '+x for x in changes) if changes else '- No concrete changes extracted; protocol now requires explicit Claude reapproval response with actionable lines.')+sep+sep+'## Additional hard rules'+sep+sep+'| Rule | Requirement |'+sep+'|---|---|'+sep+'| Approval evidence | Final protocol may be APPROVED only when the current Claude response explicitly says `Decision: APPROVED`. |'+sep+'| Blocker handling | If Claude says BLOCKED/CHANGE_REQUIRED, the response must include concrete patchable lines. |'+sep+'| Runtime evidence | GPT must preserve dispatch-result, runtime-state and real-response proof paths in protocol evidence. |'+sep+'| No fallback approval | Runtime blocker or fallback files are never valid approvals. |'+sep)
status='protocol_patched_from_reapproval_changes' if changes else 'protocol_patched_with_actionable_reapproval_rule'
state={'bem':'BEM-856','status':status,'changes_count':len(changes),'patched_protocol':str(patched),'next_action':'re-request Claude approval for patched protocol','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem856_patch_protocol_from_reapproval_changes.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem856_patch_protocol_from_reapproval_changes.md').write_text('# BEM-856 | Patch Protocol From Reapproval Changes | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem856_next.md').write_text('Next: re-request Claude approval for patched protocol. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-856'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: re-request Claude approval for patched protocol'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(patched),'governance/state/bem856_patch_protocol_from_reapproval_changes.json','governance/reports/bem856_patch_protocol_from_reapproval_changes.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem856_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Patched the agreed protocol using extracted Claude reapproval changes or an actionable reapproval requirement when extraction is empty')
"""
